caption: The video features a split-screen composition showing two distinct scenes. On the right side of the frame, Joe Biden is depicted from the chest up, wearing a dark navy blue suit, a white dress shirt, and a blue and white patterned tie. He is positioned outdoors with the White House and an American flag visible in the background under a bright sky. On the left side of the frame, a close-up shot shows a large burger with melted cheese and a side of thick-cut potato fries served on a white plate. In the background of the food shot, another burger is partially visible. Across the sequence of frames, the imagery remains static; Joe Biden's facial expression and posture do not change, and the food on the plate remains in the same position, creating a repetitive visual effect.
